test_cases.title: createTracker 有条件注册事件 + tool + createItem
test_cases.description: 验证 core.ts 有条件注册 triggerEvent、注册 turn_end/session_start/session_tree/before_agent_start handler、registerTool、createItem 内部函数存在

test_cases.title: use_skill(start) 的 name 校验逻辑存在
test_cases.description: 验证 core.ts 在 start action 中调用 isValidSkillName 并返回 'not found' 错误
steps: Assert isValidSkillName call exists in start handler

test_cases.title: skill-execution.ts 不含被动监听代码
test_cases.description: 验证 triggerEvent/triggerMatch/extractSkillName/isPathInCwd 已删除，triggerTool 已配置

test_cases.title: skill-registry.ts 能扫描 scoped npm packages
test_cases.description: 验证 scanNpmBundledSkills 处理了 @scope/pkg/skills 两级目录结构，并在开发机上验证可发现 scoped skills
steps: Assert scoped package handling exists (startsWith('@') + scoped comment)
Verify scoped skills discoverable on dev machine

test_cases.title: cancelled 可从 loaded 和 error 转入
abandoned 是纯系统终态
test_cases.description: abandoned 是终态、不可转出、不在 ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS 的 from 中

test_cases.title: error threshold 逻辑存在
test_cases.description: 验证 core.ts 含 errorThreshold 比较、errorCount 递增、steering.onError 调用

test_cases.title: session restore 过滤终态 item
test_cases.description: 验证 reconstructState + isTerminalStatus filter 存在

test_cases.title: 旧 skill-state-tracker 格式向后兼容
test_cases.description: 验证 legacyEntryTypes 含 skill-state-tracker、deserializeState 处理 skillMdPath 映射
steps: Read types.ts: assert deserializeState handles skillMdPath mapping

test_cases.title: remind 在 remindInterval turn 后触发
turn_end 中 abandoned 检查先于 remind
test_cases.description: 验证 abandonThreshold 存在、abandoned 状态存在、检查顺序正确
steps: Assert abandoned check position < remind check position

test_cases.title: reconstructState 中 abandoned 检查存在
test_cases.description: 验证 reconstructState 函数内含 abandonThreshold + abandoned 检查
steps: Assert abandonThreshold check exists in reconstructState
